ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($Setup.RES_Config_Switch__c.RES_Validation_Rules_Off__c),
OR( $RecordType.DeveloperName = "RES_Residential_Single_Buyer", $RecordType.DeveloperName = "RES_Residential_Multi_Buyer" ),
NOT(ISNEW()),
OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), "Closed Won"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), "Closed Lost") ),
$Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Opportunity is Closed Won/Lost, so cannot be edited.
